pi_items.verified_value: VitalDB published in Nature Scientific Data (Sci Data) on June 8, 2022. Lee HC, Park Y, Yoon SB, Yang SM, Park D, Jung CW. 6,388 surgical cases with 486,451 data tracks.
Real surgical patient vital signs data from Seoul National University Hospital, non-cardiac surgeries (general, thoracic, urologic, gynecologic)
pi_items.source: VitalDB published dataset documentation and Nature Scientific Data article

privileged_info_summary: Case 0003 contains real surgical patient vital signs data from VitalDB, a published open dataset of 6,388 cases from Seoul National University Hospital. The case file contains 81 physiological tracks including required vital signs (HR from Solar8000/HR, SPO2 from Solar8000/PLETH_SPO2, MBP from Solar8000/NIBP_MBP, CO2 from Solar8000/ETCO2 and Primus tracks) along with waveform signals and other parameters that must be excluded (ECG from SNUADC channels, PLETH from multiple sources, AWP from Primus/AWP). The task requires exporting a PDF summary showing only the 4 essential vital sign trends without waveform data.
